entities.name: INDIA
entities.description: A country in South Asia where the study was conducted

entities.name: LAND TENURE
entities.description: The legal or customary system in which land is owned, occupied, or used

entities.name: VDSA PANEL DATASET
entities.description: The Village Dynamics in South Asia panel dataset used for analysis from 2010 to 2015

entities.name: PLOT SIZE
entities.description: The size of the land plots used for cultivation

entities.name: FARM PRODUCTIVITY
entities.description: The measure of agricultural output per unit of input or land

entities.name: OWNER OPERATED LANDS
entities.description: Lands that are both owned and managed by the same individual or household

entities.name: HIERARCHICAL MIXED EFFECTS MODELS
entities.description: A statistical modeling approach used to account for the nested structure of the data

entities.name: TRANSFORMATION PARAMETERS
entities.description: Parameters used to adjust variables to accommodate non-linear relationships

entities.name: LAND REFORM PROCESSES
entities.description: Policies and actions aimed at redistributing land or changing land tenure systems

entities.name: LAND CONSOLIDATION
entities.description: The process of merging small, fragmented land parcels into larger, more efficient units

entities.name: CEILING POLICIES
entities.description: Regulations that set a maximum limit on the amount of land an individual or entity can own
